name: Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme for Central Armed Police Forces and Assam Rifles
provider: Ministry of Home Affairs (CAPF) / Ministry of Defence (Assam Rifles), Government of India
source_name: National Scholarship Portal — PM Scholarship Scheme for CAPF & AR
summary: Scholarship exclusively for wards and widows of Central Armed Police Forces (BSF, CRPF, CISF, ITBP, SSB, NSG) and Assam Rifles personnel. Provides ₹2,500–₹3,000/month depending on course type. No income ceiling. Requires a service/ex-service certificate from the parent's unit.
docs_required: Service Certificate / Ex-Service Certificate (from parent's CAPF/AR unit)
source_note: Centrally administered via NSP. Two sub-schemes: one under MHA for CAPF wards, one under Ministry of Defence for AR wards. Both available on NSP under the same scheme family.
verification_note: No income limit — income_limit is null. The 60% min_marks in Class 12 is the well-cited eligibility floor for this scheme. Deadline is approximate; verify current cycle on NSP. The service certificate requirement (parent must be serving or ex-CAPF/AR personnel) cannot be checked by the match engine's StudentProfile fields — this record will correctly return insufficient_data for all users, which is the intended behaviour. Two sub-categories exist (professional ₹3,000/month, non-professional ₹2,500/month); this record is the umbrella entry.
